task_completion.description: Verify that the original experiment has been renamed to 'Phase 1: Transfection'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an experiment card, title, or breadcrumb named 'Phase 1: Transfection' within the 'Cell Line Development' project.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new experiment named 'Phase 2: Selection' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an experiment card, title, or breadcrumb named 'Phase 2: Selection' within the 'Cell Line Development' project.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Selection' task is located inside the 'Phase 2: Selection' experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a task card named 'Selection' on the canvas or task list of the 'Phase 2: Selection' experiment.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Expansion' task is located inside the 'Phase 2: Selection' experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a task card named 'Expansion' on the canvas or task list of the 'Phase 2: Selection' experiment.

task_completion.description: Verify that the remaining tasks ('Media Prep', 'Cell Seeding', 'Transfection Mix', 'Incubation') are still in the 'Phase 1: Transfection' experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for task cards named 'Media Prep', 'Cell Seeding', 'Transfection Mix', and 'Incubation' on the canvas or task list of the 'Phase 1: Transfection' experiment.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the SciNote web GUI to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SciNote web interface being navigated and interacted with, rather than terminal windows or API clients.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show SQL commands or scripts being executed to rename experiments or move tasks.

integrity.description: Verify that the results are shown in the actual SciNote application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard SciNote layout, not a mocked up text file or altered HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new experiment must be named 'Phase 2: Selection'. The original experiment must be renamed to 'Phase 1: Transfection'. The tasks 'Selection' and 'Expansion' must be moved to 'Phase 2: Selection'. The tasks 'Media Prep', 'Cell Seeding', 'Transfection Mix', and 'Incubation' must remain in 'Phase 1: Transfection'.
